violations.text: One of the hand-washing sinks on the service line was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The cutting board of the service line prep unit observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Raw animal foods such as liquid egg was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods mushrooms and salmon in the 4-door stack refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The floors under the ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Sink in the back was lacking signage New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Frozen sausage patties were thawing in non-running water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Food container bottom was in contact with lettuce and tomatoes. The lettuce and tomatoes were disposed of on site Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
Air gap was absent from the ice machine. Air gap must be installed New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Under shelving and equipment was observed with dirt and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024
